title: NOC 22222 – Information Systems Testing Technicians | GTR Immigration
description: Information Systems Testing Technicians are in strong demand across Canada, driven by rapid software deployment, cloud migrations, cybersecurity upgrades, fintech expansion, and government IT modernization projects. Classified under NOC 22222 (TEER 2), this occupation aligns well with:

classification.teer: 2 – College diploma or apprenticeship normally required

duties: Develop and document testing strategies & plans
employment_requirements: College diploma in computer science, programming, or network administration
Coursework in software development or IT systems
Experience with QA frameworks & test-management systems
job_outlook: This favourable gap makes the occupation attractive for candidates with:
pathways: Career progression into QA engineering, automation testing, or DevOps
additional_information: Canadian employers are actively hiring testing professionals in:

Software-development firmsSaaS & cloud providersFinancial-technology companiesHealthcare IT systemsTelecommunications networksFederal, provincial & municipal departmentsCybersecurity service providers
Annual salaries typically range between $27,900–$92,400 CAD, depending on province, automation skills, and specialization.
